name: Pie Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the flour and salt.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add ice water, stirring with a fork until dough holds together.
4. Divide the dough into two portions and form into balls.
5. Wrap each ball in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before rolling out to make pie shells.
